T6 (59th session): retired to a thin wrapper delegating to `python -m raindrop_testsys run --suite all --tolerate-manual-evidence` (the single root driver); WU9 (JS, no manifest shard yet) stays as an inline check. Kept at this path/name for existing callers (publish-release.yml CI release gate).

T6 (59th session): retired to a thin wrapper delegating to `python -m raindrop_testsys run --suite cleanroom`. Its 46 sel_* selftests (real sources in cleanroom/impl/clean/canonical/, a different physical component) are the separate cleanroom/impl/clean/canonical shard's leaf gates (T4), which jaso_catalog.py (T5) also reads directly for its own source-list data -- this .bat's body is no longer load-bearing for anything but its own direct-invocation callers.
R4 rearm pending (Codex B-spike GO for B' load_dir removal, cleanroom/f3-r2-loaddir-bspike-codex-verdict.md) -- not currently wired into run_all_gates.bat, dormant until R4 executes

gates.description: W0 all-keyboards characterization gate (CORE, standalone engine-repo clone works): builds tests/golden_all.c against hangul/*.c (except hanja.c), runs over every registered builtin keyboard x option axis, byte-diffs stdout against the frozen tests/golden_all.txt oracle. Cross-engine equivalence baseline.

Static drift gate (build 0): runtime_checklist_catalog.py check (roster<->manifest cross-check) + census (canonical selftest*.c intersect build manifest). python absent = skip. (Scope overlaps T5 -- T5 absorbs the underlying catalog logic into raindrop_testsys; this registers the CURRENT script as-is.)
F-3 R2-2 gate: assert the committed windows/tsf/nabicloud_builtin_keymaps.h still byte-equals the engine's hangul_keyboard_map_to_char. Builtin-only (ENABLE_EXTERNAL_KEYBOARDS unset).

Shell-to-engine include boundary gate (2026-07-02 arch review): production shell TUs (windows/tsf top-level, windows/settings) must consume the Sandeulbaram engine only through the public surface (cleanroom/include) + embedded builtin XML data headers -- a direct #include of any engine-internal header is a layering violation. Baseline = 0 violations.

V2 keyboard-editor bridge cross-verify gate (thin wrapper) -- invokes cleanroom/impl/clean/canonical/build_jaso_editor_verify.cmd internally (editor bridge sources live in cleanroom/, not shared/engine). Registered against the shared/engine wrapper .bat itself (what run_all_gates.bat actually calls), not the cleanroom .cmd directly.
VM (register-machine / 4z) keyboard-editor bridge cross-verify gate (thin wrapper) -- invokes cleanroom/impl/clean/canonical/build_vm_editor_verify.cmd internally.

Master-gate wrapper for the Semoe UnitMix abbrev chord-fold V2-path equivalence selftest (Y2/G7) -- invokes windows/tsf/tests/build_abbrev_chord_v2_selftest.bat internally (T3 shard excluded that selftest as owned-by-T4).

Master-gate wrapper for the Dubeol (dugyeobe/dujul-e) abbreviation trigger engine (DubeolAbbrev) selftest -- invokes windows/tsf/tests/build_dubeol_abbrev_selftest.bat internally (T3 shard excluded that selftest as owned-by-T4).

F-3 R4 gate: proves the legacy standard-XML editor preview fallback is gone (3-89/3sun-1990 must be V2 XML) -- composite: builds+runs gate_editor_preview_equiv.c THEN chains a call to build_jaso_editor_verify.bat for V2 preview composition coverage. Multi-step composite, not a single cxx_test.

JS<->C serializer differential gate (V2 edition): 2-stage native build (C kernel objects + C++ editor bridge exe) dumps each builtin keyboard's canonical serialization, then node jsc-diff-v2.js checks the JS core reproduces those bytes exactly. Hybrid native+node, not expressible as a single cxx_test.

Import-0 mechanical gate (C3/module split Step 2): msbuild sandeulbaram.vcxproj Release x64, bind the produced static lib, link a libhangul-free consumer exe against it, run its self-test, then dumpbin /imports + /symbols assert zero libhangul dependency. T4 must_fix 2 formalization (Codex Sol design GO + Fable5 GO_WITH_FIXES, all 6 must_fix folded into $defs/product + the msvc adapter) of the prior legacy_bat registration -- see tests/build_v2backend_importzero.bat for the untouched original recipe this pipeline reproduces stage-for-stage.

preconditions.reason: body-level INTEG gate: cleanroom/ absent in a standalone engine-repo clone

gates.description: Phase 3.5 runtime proof: msbuild the full NabiCloud.sln x64 Release via the CP949-safe windows/build_sln.cmd wrapper (AGENTS.md: no ad-hoc sln msbuild), stage NabiCloud.dll + the clean base Hanja dictionary into an isolated workspace with no libhangul.dll sibling, then prove LoadLibraryExW + a standalone HanjaDict run both succeed. T4 must_fix 2 formalization -- see engine.v2backend_importzero for the schema/adapter design note, and tests/build_gate_standalone_runtime.bat for the untouched original recipe this pipeline reproduces stage-for-stage.
